scripts.performance:audit-and-report: npm run performance:audit && npm run performance:report
scripts.test:storybook: rm -f tests/storybook/storybook-inventory.md && npx playwright test tests/storybook/storybook.spec.ts --project=chrome
scripts.test:storybook:all: rm -f tests/storybook/storybook-inventory.md && npx playwright test tests/storybook/storybook.spec.ts
scripts.test:storybook:update: rm -f tests/storybook/storybook-inventory.md && npx playwright test tests/storybook/storybook.spec.ts --project=chrome --update-snapshots
